bootstrap_contract.seed_source: V1.4 reproducibility matrix; the governance amendment did not freeze a seed

claim_boundary: Sequence approximation of independent dual-receptor computational Docking geometry; not binding probability, affinity, experimental competition, blocking, Docking Gold, or final submission evidence.
fail_closed_guards: collector rejects any bootstrap repetition count other than 1000 before reading run inputs
collector rejects any bootstrap seed other than 20260718 before reading run inputs
trainer and collector require the exact canonical collector matrix and SHA256 in IMPLEMENTATION_FREEZE_V1_4.json
OOF_PROMOTION_REPORT.json records the collector matrix, its SHA256, bootstrap repetitions, and bootstrap seed

governance.promotion_gate: global Spearman improves; parent-centered and Top20 non-degrade; parent bootstrap positive fraction >=0.80 and median delta >0
